title: pteris leptophylla var. gracilis
intro: Pteris leptophylla var. gracilis, also known as the slender-leaved brake, is a type of fern that belongs to the Pteris genus and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris leptophylla var. gracilis include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
